title: Choose Instructions, Skills, Plugins, Hooks, or MCP · Protocol Recall
summary: Route recurring agent needs to the smallest durable extension surface. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an extension-surface decision matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate one-turn prompts, repository instructions, reusable skills, enforcement hooks, plugins, and external tools by scope.
Use AGENTS.md or equivalent repository guidance for durable local conventions.
Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.
starterFiles.config:
# Skill and MCP integration portfolio
# Record scope, triggers, permissions, tests, and maintenance evidence.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext surface choice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Plugin Fit trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit.

content.text: For Plugin Fit, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Plugin Fit precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.
Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext surface choice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Every personal skill requires a plugin package.

stimulus.title: Plugin Fit case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext surface choice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Every personal skill requires a plugin package.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit. Artifact under review: an extension-surface decision matrix.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Plugin Fit, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Plugin Fit applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit.

hints: Name the Plugin Fit precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.
